name: Andy Bechtolsheim
background: Andy Bechtolsheim is a co-founder of Arista and has served as our Chief Architect since 2008. He also served as Chairman of the Board from 2008 to 2018. Prior to Arista, Mr. Bechtolsheim was a co-founder of Sun Microsystems and Granite Systems. He is a renowned hardware architect and was one of the first investors in Google. Mr. Bechtolsheim holds an M.S. in Computer Engineering from Carnegie Mellon University.
